subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Thy Light that hath shone forth throughout the world, and by the Fire of Thy Sacred Tree which hath been kindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک بنورک الذی سطع فی العالم و بنار سدرتک التی اشتعلت
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @Manifestation of God as sun
